raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 411 allows the CalPERS Board to reach fair resolutions with retirees who exceed the 960-hour limit without forcing them to reinstate or repay retirement income.",
    "A significant number of retirees are unaware of the 960-hour work limit, resulting in unintentional violations.",
    "An audit by CalPERS indicated that 52% of public agencies were in violation of the 960-hour rule.",
    "SB 461 enhances consumer protection by allowing county counsels in large counties to enforce the Unfair Competition Law (UCL).",
    "The existing UCL statute provides various government entities authority to protect consumers and ensure fair competition.",
    "SB 461 gives county counsels in large counties the same authority to bring UCL actions as city attorney counterparts."
  ]
}
```
